mapper.sql: id, name, stock_no, maker, year, mileage, price, status, store, fuel, transmission, inspection
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vehicles ORDER BY id
mapper.update: UPDATE vehicles SET name = #{name}, stock_no = #{stockNo}, maker = #{maker}, year = #{year}, mileage = #{mileage}, price = #{price}, status = #{status}, store = #{store}, fuel = #{fuel}, transmission = #{transmission}, inspection = #{inspection} WHERE id = #{id}
